base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dobkeratops — a character (boss) from 1987 r type. Dobkeratops — Stage-1 end-boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dobkeratops — Stage-1 end-boss; massive biomechanical alien-fetus with pulsing core. 669×2145 vertical canvas with multi-phase attack poses. Iconic R-Type signature-boss (Giger-inspired)
